title: SAP Component Generator
description: Generates a new Angular component with documentation, examples, and e2e tests as a sub-library of core, platform, cdk, cx, or btp

name.description: Component name (kebab-case, e.g., 'my-button'). Used to generate component selector, class name, and file names.
name.x-prompt: What is the component name? (use kebab-case, e.g., 'my-button')

project.description: Target library to generate the component in. Each library has a specific selector prefix: core (fd-), platform (fdp-), cx (fdx-), cdk (fdk-), btp (fdb-)

x-prompt.message: Which library should this component belong to?

items.label: btp - Business Technology Platform components (fdb- prefix)
